name: bisonfamilymedical.com
message: Bison Family Medical Clinics provides high-quality medical care through family practice and walk-in services across four locations in Winnipeg. Their team offers a diverse range of medical services, including women's health, minor procedures, and low-risk obstetrics. Emphasizing patient convenience, they also provide online booking and secure virtual care options. The clinics prioritize the needs of their patients, ensuring they receive care and respect in a clean and friendly environment. Employees: 10 Revenue: $5 Million Industry: Hospitals & Physicians Clinics  Phone Number: (204) 275-1500
